treatment_information.specific_treatment: laparoscopically assisted sigmoid colectomy with diverting loop ileostomy
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient has improved significantly over the last month, tolerating a regular diet and has a good appetite.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 5 mg Tablet, One (1) Tablet PO Q4H as needed for pain.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient is no longer taking any Vicodin at this point.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient hospitalized and treated with IV antibiotics.
Percutaneous drainage for diverticular pelvic abscess performed.
Laparoscopically assisted sigmoid colectomy with diverting loop ileostomy performed.
Patient reports significant improvement and tolerating regular diet.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient is asymptomatic and has improved significantly.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient feels much stronger and is keeping up with ileostomy output.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient is excited about getting his ileostomy taken down and feels he is getting his strength again.
